description_long: This object is a single slice of bread with a golden-brown crust and a soft, airy interior. The crust is slightly uneven and features a scattering of white sesame seeds, especially along the rounded edge. The surface of the bread slice is matte and textured, with visible air pockets and a light tan color. The slice appears to be from an artisanal loaf, with a rustic, hand-cut appearance and no uniformity in thickness. The interior crumb is porous and pale, contrasting with the darker, toasted-looking crust. There are no visible brand markings, packaging, or labels on the bread.
description: A rustic slice of bread with a golden-brown, sesame-seeded crust and a soft, airy interior. The surface is matte and textured, with visible air pockets and a hand-cut appearance.
description_view_0: This view shows the bread slice from a slightly elevated angle, highlighting the golden-brown crust and the airy, pale interior with visible air pockets.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the thickness of the slice and the rounded, sesame-seeded edge of the crust, with the interior crumb visible along the top.
description_view_2: The view focuses on the broad, flat surface of the bread, showing the distribution of sesame seeds along the crust and the porous texture of the crumb.
description_view_3: This perspective highlights the opposite edge of the slice, with a clear view of the crust's texture and the matte, slightly uneven surface of the bread.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is golden-brown with a rustic, uneven texture and is dotted with white sesame seeds, especially along the rounded edge. There are no visible scoring marks or flour dusting, giving it a natural, artisanal appearance.
